name: paper-writing-workflow
description: 模块化 8 阶段学术论文写作全流程工作流 — 从选题到投稿。整合 nature-skills + ARS + Omniscale 三件套（已内置） + Zotero MCP，支持单阶段独立调用或全流程自动化。包含详细使用手册。

bundledSkills.name: critique
bundledSkills.description: Formalist Devil's Advocate — find logical flaws, data leakage, circular reasoning, and fallacies

bundledSkills.name: summarize-paper
bundledSkills.description: Analyze scientific papers and generate comprehensive structured summaries

bundledSkills.name: research-map
bundledSkills.description: Generate or update a structured research map for a project
